title: LC-MS analysis for plant global metabolomics: C18 analysis.
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2rubi","text":"The LC-MS analysis for global metabolomics was carried out on a Thermo Scientific Vanquish UHPLC chromatography and Thermo Scientific Q Exactive Plus mass spectrometer. The Column was a Luna omega Polar C18 (Phenomenex 1.6 µm, 150 × 2.1 mm). Injection temperature and volume were 10° C and 5 µL for final sample concentration at 1 mg/ml. Elution parameters consisted of a flow rate of 0.4 mL/min with water acidified (0.05% formic acid) as solvent A and acetonitrile acidified (0.05% formic acid) as solvent B using the following gradient: 2% B (0 – 0.5 min), 2 to 70% B (0.5 - 8 min), 70 to 98% B (8 - 9 min) 98% B (9 - 12 min), 98 to 2% B (12 – 12.1 min) and 98%B (12.1 – 14 min). DAD and CAD detectors can be used.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Analysis are done on a Q-exactive Plus (ThermoScientific) spectrometer equipped with a heated electrospray (HESI II) or APCI probe, a Diode Array Detector (DAD, ThermoScientific), a Charged Aerosol Detector (CAD, ThermoScientific) and coupled with U-HPLC system (Vanquish model H,ThermoScientific). U-HPLC Vanquish - Q Exactive Plus (U-HPLC-HRMS, Thermo Scientific, Q-Exactive Plus + Vanquish double pump, CAD, DAD, https://s3.amazonaws.com/protocols-files/files/qruacdgy7.jpg )

Elution gradient (same for Pump 1 (column) and Pump 2 (CAD)) : Time (min) % A1 (pump 1)% B (pump 2 CAD) % B1 (pump 1)% A (pump 2 CAD) 1 0 98 2 2 0.5 98 2 3 08 30 70 4 09 2 98 5 12.0 2 98 6 12.1 98 2 7 14.0 98 2
DAD conditions: Three usual UV-vis wavelenghts are programmed: * UV-vis 1 = 254 nm * UV-vis 2 = 200 nm * Uv-vis 3 = 320 nm
CAD conditions: Split is adjusted to 75

In this example, a standard mix is injected at 10 µg/mL with the parameters described before in positive and negative mode. Chromatogram of the standard mix in positive mode (5µL) : Chromatogram of the standard mix in negative mode (5µL)

Column: Phenomenex Luna omega Polar C18 1.6 µm, 150 × 2.1 mm + UHPLC Fully Porous Polar C18 2.1mm precolumn (SecurityGuard ULTRA Cartridges, Phenomenex) C18 Polar LC Column, 150 x 2.1 mm (LC column, Luna Omega, 00F-4748-AN, Luna Omega 1.6µm Polar C18 100Å, LC Column 150 x 2.1 mm, EA, https://www.phenomenex.com/part?partNo=00F-4748-AN ) SecurityGuard ULTRA Holder (guard column holder, Phenomenex, AJ0-9000, 2.1-4.6 mm ID, https://www.phenomenex.com/part?partNo=AJ0-9000 )
Mobile phase for gradient: A1: H2O + 0.05% Formic acid B1: ACN + 0.05% Formic acid
Mobile phase for CAD counter gradient: A: ACN + 0.05% Formic acid B: H2O + 0.05% Formic acid
Mobile phase for injection loop: ACN/H2O (50/50)
Mobile phase for pump head 1: IPA/H2O (75/25) + 0.05% Formic acid
Mobile phase for pump head 2: H20/IPA (90/10)
cf tutorial data processing Agromix
Extracts of plant and associate microorganism 1 mg/mL, extract sample
Prepare a Quality Control (QC) = mix of all samples, a blank (solvent) and a blank of extraction.
Prepare a Quality Control (QC) = mix of all samples, a blank (solvent) and a blank of extraction. Inject QC and blank (solvent) every 6 injections.
C18 MS parameters (January 2025): Global list - only exclusion list used Tune File External Hardware - Only divert valve a used MS experiment : Full MS/ddMS2 MS experiment : Full MS/ddMS2 parameters

Acquisitions are done in ESI full scan + MS/MS in positive and negative modes. Location of Instrument methods: folder Data (D)> Acquisition> METHODS-LC-MS>Metabo Copy in your folder, the most recent version C18 LC parameters (January 2025): Pump 1 General settings Pump 1 flow gradient Pump 2 General settings Pump 2 flow gradient Sampler module Sampler module, temperature control Column compartiment (Preheat: Off) UV settings UV settings CAD settings CAD settings System Smart Startup Smart Shutdown Smart Standby
%s %s

Reagents for mobiles phase and LC system Formic acid >99% for LC-MS VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #84865.260 (CAS: 64-18-6) Acetonitrile LC-MS Grade Fisher Scientific Catalog #A/0638/15 (CAS: 75-05-8) Ultrapure Water Merck Millipore Isopropanol, Certified AR for Analysis, Fisher Chemical Fisher Scientific Catalog # 10366430 (CAS: 67-63-0)

Equipments SecurityGuard ULTRA holder (Guard column holder, Phenomenex, AJ0-9000 , 2.1 to 4.6mm ID, https://www.phenomenex.com/part?partNo=AJ0-9000 ) C18 Polar LC Column, 150 x 2.1 mm (LC column, Luna Omega, 00F-4748-AN, Luna Omega 1.6µm Polar C18 100Å, LC Column 150 x 2.1 mm, EA, https://www.phenomenex.com/part?partNo=00F-4748-AN ) Verex Insert, 175µL (Insert, Phenomenex, AR0-4521-13 , Verex Insert, 5mm Dia., 175µL, Clear 51, Conical Bottom, w/ bottom spring) Preslit Screw cap (Screw cap, Fisherbrand, 11797567, 9mm PP Short Thread Seal, Blue, Center Hole, Assembled Septum) Glass vial 1.5ml (Glass vial, Fisherbrand, 11575884, 9 mm Short Thread Glass Vial, Wide Opening) U-HPLC Vanquish - Q Exactive Plus (U-HPLC-HRMS, Thermo Scientific, Q-Exactive Plus + Vanquish double pump, CAD, DAD, https://s3.amazonaws.com/protocols-files/files/qruacdgy7.jpg ) Thermo Scientific Xcalibur 4.416.14
Injection Volume: 5 µl (@ 1mg/ml)
creator: Sylvie Fournier
